transcript: Uhh... Do you have anything by Ellen, uh, Prack?
Um, well... she plays in the band Back.
I... haven't even heard of it.
I haven't even heard of that one.
I... '[beep]' we don't have it in stock.
Um. 'Kay, do you have anything by The Melons?
Um, I was looking for a couple other releases.
Because those just aren't things that are generally stocked by the local warehouse.
Um... How about, uh... uhm... [pitch shifted] Eel Brain? That may-- [beep] ...sh... like, that is a real band.
Yeah ya did. [drums] I was just looking for some bands and you hung up on me.
No, I'm sorry. There was a '[beep]' disconnection, I did not hang up on you.
Yeah you did. Yeah you did, I heard you hang up. Well do you have Eel... Eel Gut, then?
No, I sure don't. That... you asked me that about two weeks ago.
Is there any particular reason why you keep calling me and doing this?
Well I've called... this is the first time I've phoned you.
This is the third time I've spoken with you personally on the phone.
I'm looking for these releases, that's my only reason for calling you. I'm looking for these records and I am [beep] prepared to buy them.

Yes, well, I'm sorry, but uh, every time you've called, you've given me a bunch of titles, we do not carry any of those, most of them are imports, if you'd like to check Wax Trax, I'm sure that they can probably order them for you.
They can probably get 'em. Um. But, you don't have anything by Carla Wi-- [beep] Winfrey?
Mhhhm... What kind of music is it?
Um, well. I don't know, she just does like a [beep] bunch of sheet me... met... metal variations.
Ummm... no I don't see a listing for it. [croak]
Um. Okay, there was two more I was looking for. [laughs] Uhm, it's called... umm... Ape Butt.
That is a band, and they're on Enigma. Do you carry that? As well?
Well, most of those are... are ones we can't carry anyways without having an over 18 rule on them, so we stay away from 'em.
Oh, no. Th... they're not offensive in any way. They're instrumental. But... [beep] They just have a weird name. Um... let's see, how about, uhhh, let's see, Dar... Darla Clacker?
